82419938.title: Britain's Got Talent series 19
82419938.extract: The nineteenth series of British talent competition programme Britain's Got Talent is set to begin airing on ITV1 on 21 February 2026. Filming for the auditions began in October 2025 in Birmingham and Blackpool. The series will be presented by Ant & Dec, with Simon Cowell, Amanda Holden, Alesha Dixon returning as judges, alongside KSI, who replaced Bruno Tonioli on the judging panel following his departure after three series.
